buildCommand: curl -sSL https://dot.net/v1/dotnet-install.sh | bash /dev/stdin --channel 8.0 --install-dir /tmp/dotnet && export PATH="/tmp/dotnet:$PATH" && node scripts/generate-version.js && dotnet publish osu-tools/PerformanceCalculator/PerformanceCalculator.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained false && dotnet publish OsuNodeHelper/OsuNodeHelper.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained false && cp OsuNodeHelper/bin/Release/net8.0/linux-x64/publish/OsuNodeHelper.dll public/ && next build --turbopack
